name: proc_access_win_lsass_susp_access_flag
raw_query: any where (winlog.event_data.TargetImage:"*\\lsass.exe" and ((winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess like~ ("*30", "*50", "*70", "*90", "*B0", "*D0", "*F0", "*18", "*38", "*58", "*78", "*98", "*B8", "*D8", "*F8", "*1A", "*3A", "*5A", "*7A", "*9A", "*BA", "*DA", "*FA", "*0x14C2")) or (winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess like~ ("0x100000*", "0x1418*", "0x1438*", "0x143a*", "0x1f0fff*", "0x1f1fff*", "0x1f2fff*", "0x1f3fff*", "0x40*")))) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("*:\\Program Files (x86)\\*", "*:\\Program Files\\*", "*:\\Windows\\System32\\*", "*:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\*")) or (process.executable:"*:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\*" and process.executable:"*\\MsMpEng.exe") or ((winlog.event_data.CallTrace:"*|?:\\ProgramData\\Microsoft\\Windows Defender\\Definition Updates\\{*" and winlog.event_data.CallTrace:"*}\\mpengine.dll+*") and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x1418") or (winlog.event_data.CallTrace like~ ("*|c:\\program files\\windows defender\\mprtp.dll*", "*|c:\\program files\\windows defender\\MpClient.dll*")) or (process.executable:"*\\explorer.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x401"))) and (not (process.executable:"*:\\ProgramData\\MALWAREBYTES\\MBAMSERVICE\\ctlrupdate\\mbupdatr.exe" or process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Microsoft VS Code\\Code.exe" or (process.executable:"*:\\ProgramData\\VMware\\VMware Tools\\*" and process.executable:"*\\vmtoolsd.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("*\\PROCEXP64.EXE", "*\\PROCEXP.EXE")) and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x40") or (process.executable:"*\\MBAMInstallerService.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x40") or ((process.executable like~ ("*\\aurora-agent-64.exe", "*\\aurora-agent.exe", "*\\thor.exe", "*\\thor64.exe")) and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x40") or ((process.executable like~ ("*\\handle.exe", "*\\handle64.exe")) and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x40") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\WebEx\\WebexHost.exe" and winlog.event_data.GrantedAccess:"0x401") or process.executable:"*\\SteamLibrary\\steamapps\\*"))
